script: echo === /home/heather ===; sudo ls -la /home/heather/ 2>&1; echo; echo === heather-bot.service unit ===; sudo cat /etc/systemd/system/heather-bot.service 2>&1; echo; echo === any heather teams-app anywhere ===; sudo find / -maxdepth 5 -iname 'manifest.json' -path '*heather*' 2>/dev/null | head; sudo find / -maxdepth 5 -name '*heather*teams*' 2>/dev/null | head
